Booted out by Vikings in 1013, English King Ethelred got this adjective permanently affixed to his name

Gimme an O! & I'll turn a rolling doodad from under the furniture into a flat doodad on top of the furniture
Gimme a Y! & I'll turn a nutrient-rich organ meat into a uniform for my chauffeur

Gimme a D! & I'll turn a collab based on mutual interests into a collab based on (wink wink) "mutual interests"
